final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: atmospheric interior editorial photo, square crop
Primary request: dark gothic castle interior with towering vaulted ceiling, blood-red light streaming through stained glass windows, candlestick holders and iron chain decorations, heavy shadows, mysterious and oppressive atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: grand gothic castle hall interior, massive stone vaulted arches, aged stone walls with deep crevices
Subject: soaring ribbed vaulted ceiling, large stained glass windows casting blood-red colored light beams, ornate iron candelabras with dripping candles, heavy iron chains hanging as decoration
Style/medium: photorealistic dark gothic illustration, painterly with dramatic chiaroscuro
Composition/framing: wide-angle interior shot, low eye-level, emphasizing the towering height of the vaulted ceiling
Lighting/mood: blood-red filtered light from stained glass, flickering candlelight pools in deep shadow, oppressive and mysterious, extreme contrast between light and darkness
Color palette: deep crimson and blood red from stained glass, near-black stone grey, dim amber candlelight, dominant shadow blacks
Materials/textures: rough-hewn ancient stone, weathered iron chains with rust, melted wax drips on iron candelabras, dusty stained glass
Constraints: no human figures; keep the atmosphere heavy, shadowed, and claustrophobic despite the grand scale
Avoid: bright cheerful lighting, clean modern surfaces, cartoon style, watermark
